title: BEM-854 route reapproval
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols','governance/roadmap']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:30 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem853_verify_reapproval_response.json')
decision=prev.get('decision','UNKNOWN')
if decision=='APPROVED':
    marker=Path('governance/roadmap/BEM854_PROTOCOL_REAPPROVED_RESUME.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-854 | Protocol Reapproved — Resume Roadmap'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Decision: APPROVED'+sep+'Source: governance/state/bem853_verify_reapproval_response.json'+sep+'Protocol: governance/protocols/BEM846_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md'+sep)
    status='reapproval_approved_resume_marker_created'
    next_action='resume roadmap implementation under reapproved protocol'
    created_files=[str(marker)]
elif decision in ['CHANGE_REQUIRED','BLOCKED']:
    marker=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem854_reapproval_repair_required.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-854 | Reapproval Repair Required'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: extract required changes from BEM-853 response and patch protocol.'+sep)
    status='reapproval_repair_required'
    next_action='extract changes/blockers from reapproval response and patch protocol'
    created_files=[str(marker)]
else:
    status='reapproval_missing_or_unknown'
    next_action='repair dispatcher/response path; reapproval response not usable'
    created_files=[]
state={'bem':'BEM-854','status':status,'decision':decision,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem854_route_after_reapproval.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem854_route_after_reapproval.md').write_text('# BEM-854 | Route After Reapproval | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem854_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-854'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem854_route_after_reapproval.json','governance/reports/bem854_route_after_reapproval.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem854_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after Claude reapproval decision to roadmap resume, repair required, or response-path repair')
"""
No issue comments.
